title: asterosedum stoloniferum
intro: Asterosedum stoloniferum, also known as Creeping Sedum, is a succulent perennial plant belonging to the Crassulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant's leaves and roots are known to have medicinal properties that can help in treating various health issues, including cold sores, wounds, and skin conditions, thanks to its antiviral and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Asterosedum stoloniferum is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
